Since Moon and Venus are feminine, J ala tattva may refer
to the birth of a female. But what about Prithivi tattva and
Vayu tattva ruled respectively by Mercury and Saturn? Vayu
tattva is given to Saturn and it is said to refer to the female
births. Like Saturn, Mercury too is a eunuch. Why should
Prithivi tattva be called masculine? The best way to consider
Prithivi and Vayu tattvas as both male and female.
According to Nadis each sign has 300 parts. The first 150
parts have a sequence and this is reversed in the next 150
parts. This division enabled them to determine the sex, caste,
place of birth and so on. Each degree of a sign has ten parts;
and each part has a duration of six minutes of that degree.
Each degree has sixty minutes, and each minute has sixty
seconds. The Sun apparently covers the 360 degrees within
twenty four hours. He traverses one degree in four minutes.
One tenth of a degree takes twenty four seconds. This is the
